title: Submit Your URL
text: Enter your business website and we'll query ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude to see if they recommend you.
You'll receive a detailed AI visibility score within 24 hours — no cost, no commitment.

title: We Audit & Optimize
text: Our team analyzes your AI visibility across all engines and builds a custom GEO optimization roadmap using Princeton-backed methodology.
We identify exactly where you're invisible and what content changes will get you cited.

title: You Get Recommended
text: We optimize your digital presence so AI engines cite your business when customers ask who to hire in your market.
Monthly tracking shows your progress as AI engines start recognizing and recommending you.
